subcodes.first_line: O My Friend! Upon thee be My glory! Months and years have passed, and no mention of thee hath reached the Remembered One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بائی علیک بهائی شهور و سنین گذشت و ذکری از شما نزد مذکور نیامد البته
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
